function.message: I can confirm Black Library Evenings starts on 2026-05-02, but I can’t safely complete the rest: I could not find a canonical project record for “BlueMesa Quotebook,” so I cannot verify whether it started earlier or determine a uniquely supported deletion target. Please provide the exact BlueMesa Quotebook project folder/path (or clarify which project set to compare for “earliest”).
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item workflow; used canonical project lane rules from 40_projects/AGENTS.MD; followed deletion-and-wiping rule to stop when deletion target is not uniquely supported; per inbox-processing-v2-update made no partial mutations.
function.outcome_justification: 40_projects/AGENTS.MD defines canonical project references as README.MD files under project folders. A canonical BlueMesa Quotebook project record was not found, so the requested start-date comparison cannot be verified from canonical evidence, and deletion-and-wiping.md requires clarification instead of guessing when deletion evidence is not unique.
